title: session_parts() is pub(super), not pub: correct visibility for a shared helper
description: session_parts() on JmapChatClient is declared pub(super) in mod.rs and called from chat.rs, message.rs, contact.rs, and misc.rs via Self::session_parts(). A contributor might make it pub to avoid needing to think about visibility, or private to the crate. pub(super) is exactly right: it is a shared implementation detail of the methods module family, not part of the public API. Making it pub would expose an internal helper to downstream crates; making it private would prevent the sub-modules from sharing it.
